summary_en: 2,000,000 shares (2.26% of shares outstanding) with ¥2.0B upper limit. Acquisition window 27 May–31 December 2026 via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange. Rationale: capital efficiency and responsive capital allocation.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On 26 May 2026, the board of Axial Retailing Inc. resolved to acquire treasury stock under the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 2,000,000 ordinary shares (2.26% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) with a budget ceiling of ¥2.0 billion. Acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between 27 May and 31 December 2026. The stated rationale is to enhance capital efficiency and execute flexible capital allocation responsive to changing business conditions. As of the resolution date, the company held 4,964,748 treasury shares against 88,587,408 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
